data.title: Update CLAUDE.md and workflow docs for test quality enforcement
data.description:
## Description
Update project documentation for the test quality enforcement overlay and pre-commit gate.

### File Impact
- CLAUDE.md — Edit

## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] CLAUDE.md documents test quality gate
  Verify: grep -q "test.quality" CLAUDE.md
